info.title: mynumbers-disconnection
info.description:
Disconnection Services API for requesting disconnection of your numbers.

What are the errors that MyNumbers API can return ?

| Code | Description | Http response | | --- | --- | --- | | E001 | The product does not exist in our system. | 400 | | E002 | The country does not exist in our system. | 400 | | E003 | The Location (Area Code) does not exist in the Country for Product. | 400 | | E018 | The product is not yet handled via our API. | 400 | | E020 | Please fill out all the mandatory attributes. | 400 | | E030 | The service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry later or contact BICS. | 500 | | E031 | The media type in your header is invalid. Please use application/json. | 400 | | E033 | There is no address with this reference in our system. Please correct the reference. | 400 | | E035 | The length of the attribute {attribute} is too long. The maximum length for this attribute is {size} characters. | 400 | | E055 | The format of the email is not valid. Please correct it. | 400 | | E060 | The number specified in request does not exist. | 404 | | E061 | Enum value is specified incorrectly. | 400 | | E081 | Request payload is invalid. | 400 | | E086 | Invalid value for parameter {attribute}. | 400 | | E089 | This number is specified several times in the request. Please specify every number once only. | 400 | | E093 | Limit is {amount} numbers per request. | 400 | | E117 | This API does not support product {product}. | 400 | | E119 | A previous task is still pending. Please try again later. | 409 | | E122 | No commercial agreement found. Please contact BICS. | 400 | | E123 | DELETE is not possible due to current status. | 400 | | E124 | UPDATE is not possible due to current status. | 400 | | E125 | This number is already in another active Emergency Services Order. | 400 | | E126 | The requested service is not available on this number. | 400 | | E127 | The requested service is already active on this number. | 400 | | E128 | Submit is not possible due to current status. | 400 |

post.description: Submit your order so that we can start processing it and disconnect numbers as soon as possible.

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

401.description: The API Key was not mentioned or is invalid (see authentication)

403.description: This service cannot be used according to your API Key

delete.summary: Delete disconnection order item by order id and order item id
delete.description: Remove a number from your order. This method is only allowed when the status is 'Draft'.

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

401.description: The API Key was not mentioned or is invalid (see authentication)

403.description: This service cannot be used according to your API Key

404.description: Order or order item does not exist

post.description: Create an empty Disconnection Order. With the add Order Item, you can now add numbers to your Disconnection Order.  The location to the order is specified in the response header - **location:** /disconnection/orders/**{orderId}**.

201.description: Successful operation. Created order id is returned in response header **location:** /disconnection/orders/**{orderId}**

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

401.description: The API Key was not mentioned or is invalid (see authentication)

403.description: This service cannot be used according to your API Key

post.summary: Add disconnection order item by order id
post.description: Add a number to your order. This method is allowed only when the status is "Draft".

200.description: List of disconnection services order items

400.description: Bad request, An issue occurred while processing the input parameters.

401.description: The API Key was not mentioned or is invalid (see authentication)

403.description: This service cannot be used according to your API Key

SubmitDisconnectionOrderResponse.description: An object representing response for submit disconnection order

contactNumber.description: Your telephone number, multiple numbers are separated by semi-colon ';'.

additionalNotes.description: Your additional information about this Disconnection Order.

email.description: Address(es) of Disconnection order responsible(s), multiple addresses are separated by semi-colon ';'. This value is included in all communications regarding this request.

code.description: Error code, the complete description can be found in API documentation

description.description: Description of the error, the complete description can be found in API documentation
description.example: Description of the error that occurred.

timestamp.description: timestamp of error in UTC format
